description_long: This object is a handheld electric drill with a cylindrical body, primarily black in color, featuring a ribbed grip section for secure handling. The front end has a circular chuck area where a drill bit would be attached, but currently, no bit is present. A metallic accent, likely a clip or a part of the switch mechanism, is visible on the upper side of the body. The rear end is slightly flared, possibly for balance or to house internal components. The surface appears to be made of metal and plastic, with some metallic highlights and a generally robust, industrial design. No visible power cord or battery pack is attached, and there are no clear brand markings or logos.
description: A robust, black handheld electric drill with a ribbed grip, metallic accents, and no visible drill bit or power source.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the drill, ribbed grip, metallic accent, and circular chuck at the front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular chuck opening and the alignment of the grip and body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the ribbed grip and metallic accent from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the flared end and the cylindrical body tapering towards the back.
